response.overview: Timepiece (2024) ek emotional aur thought-provoking British short drama film hai jo Sam naam ki ek young girl ki kahani par mabni hai. Jab woh apni bus miss kar deti hai, to uski mulaqat ek ajeeb buzurg aadmi se hoti hai. Yeh chhoti si mulaqat dheere dheere ek gehri aur dil ko choo lene wali kahani mein tabdeel ho jati hai jo waqt, yaadon aur insani rishton ki ahmiyat ko ujagar karti hai. Film ka runtime sirf 9 minutes hai, lekin yeh apne emotional message aur meaningful storytelling ki wajah se viewers par gehra asar chhodti hai.  For more movie reviews, presentations, and downloadable content, visit SlidesExtract.com.
response.tagline: A Short Film About Time, Memories & Meaning.
response.title: Timepiece
